title: Nami’s Condition Worsens
description: On pages 5–8, nami’s condition worsens as the crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them.
scene: Nami’s Condition Worsens. The crew searches desperately for medical help as Nami’s fever worsens and the Grand Line’s dangers keep testing them. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Will she die!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: (Please don't die, Nami)

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahhh how how how how man how

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: -Xuggo

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Stop making a fuss and shut up!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We have to go find a doctor and save Nami right away!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes, I know so just calm down or you might aggravate her condition further!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hm!? Nami!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: YIPEE! She got better!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No she's didn't!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: There's a news- paper,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: On top of my desk...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmm...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: All clear, nothing to worry about...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Is it about Alabasta, Vin!!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: that can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: 300,000 soldiers of the Royal Armed Forces switched sides to join the rebels!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Originally, the 600 thousand- strong royal armed forces could contain the rebels who were only 400,000 strong...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But now the situation is com- plenty opposite!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: With that, the situation in Alabama has entered its most critical phase...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: And that was the paper from 3 days ago.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Sorry for not showing it to you until now...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I didn't want to worry you any further since we were already sailing as fast as we could.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Understand, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sounds like an emergency.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's right. I'm surprised I managed to get through to you so well.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But if we don't get you to a doctor soon...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's fine.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That old thermometer's broken anyways. There's no way a person would have a fever of 40 degrees.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm sure I just caught a heatstroke or something.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'll get better just fine on my own even without seeing a doctor...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: In any case,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We'll continue to head for Alabasta as planned for now.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But thanks for worrying about me.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Sure.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So is she all better now...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: An

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Of course not, she's only putting up a tough front.

summary: This part centers on nami’s condition worsens, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
